title: Lunch & Learn: Pension and Benefits Seminar - Vancouver
content:
## Lunch & Learn: Pension and Benefits Seminar - Vancouver
We are excited to invite you to our upcoming Lunch & Learn: Pension and Benefits Seminars.
Join lawyers from McCarthy Tétrault’s Pension, Benefits & Executive Compensation Group for a dynamic and practical discussion on the latest developments shaping the pensions and benefits landscape. These engaging sessions will highlight key legal and governance trends, with a focus on the opportunities and risks that organizations and plan sponsors should be watching now. We would be delighted to welcome you to our Calgary and Vancouver offices for timely legal insights and meaningful discussions over lunch.
Topics to be discussed include:
- Pension Plan Mergers: Tips and Risks
- Pension Governance Check-in
- Pension Investment Rules 101: Practical Tips for Administrators
- From Courts to Regulators: Pension Law Developments
- Pension Protection Act Countdown: What Plan Administrators Need to Know
For questions about these events, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
